whoIAm.title: Who I am
whoIAm.subtitle: Sebastian Tamayo. Software engineer based in Medellin, Colombia.

items.title: One call to understand the problem
items.desc: We schedule a call to understand the operational problem your foundation is facing.

items.title: I define the scope and build the solution
items.desc: I design the technical architecture and start building the solution iteratively.

items.title: Eight to twelve weeks
items.desc: Most volunteer projects are delivered in 8 to 12 weeks depending on complexity.

items.title: You own the code when we finish
items.desc: Full source code, documentation and training are handed over at delivery.
